n_neighbors.guidance: Number of nearest neighbors. 10-15 for fine-grained resolution, 20-30 for coarser structure. Sciaraffa et al. 2025 found k=10 optimal when used with high-resolution clustering (resolution=2.0).

n_pcs.guidance: Number of PCs to use. Should match or be less than the n_comps used in the PCA step.

metric.guidance: Distance metric. Cosine is preferred (Sciaraffa et al. 2025). Euclidean also works well with UMAP method.

use_rep.guidance: Which representation to use. Use 'X_pca_harmony' after Harmony integration, 'X_scVI' after scVI, 'X_scanorama' after Scanorama.

method.guidance: Method for computing connectivities. 'umap' is preferred (Sciaraffa et al. 2025). 'gauss' computes Gaussian kernel-based connectivities.

validation.check: Connectivities matrix should be sparse and non-empty. All cells should have at least 1 neighbor.
